sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this mini-golf title

special_mechanics.name: Golf Launch System
special_mechanics.description: Players set power, angle, and spin to launch Kirby towards enemies and the goal hole. Isometric perspective mini-golf gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Copy Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Kirby acquires temporary power-ups by hitting specific enemies, granting unique movement/interaction abilities including tornado form, spark ball form, and UFO flight mode

physics_values.ufo_mode: Float and move at will for short duration

special_mechanics.name: Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Kirby operates as a spherical projectile throughout courses, similar to Marble Madness physics paradigm

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Game is a mini-golf title rather than traditional platformer, so standard movement parameters (walk speed, jump height, gravity) are not applicable. Physics center on golf shot mechanics (power, angle, spin) and rolling ball behavior. Available documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics and development history rather than precise physics values.
